## Checklist

- [ ] I confirm no secrets (API keys, tokens, credentials, .env values) are committed in this PR
- [ ] Tests pass (`composer test`) and lint is clean (`composer lint` / `composer sniff`)
- [ ] I have updated documentation where relevant
- [ ] If a submodule changed, the superproject pointer bump is included (or noted)
